title: platystele crotaloglossa
intro: Platystele crotaloglossa, also known as the "dwarf orchid," is a species of epiphytic orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. The plant is used to treat a variety of health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its antipyretic and expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, Platystele crotaloglossa is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal benefits.
